blocks.text: Match preview: New Zealand Women face Scotland Women in 19th Match, Group B (T20) on Tue, 23 Jun, 2026, 3:00 pm at County Ground Bristol. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: New Zealand Women vs Scotland Women

blocks.text: Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Light drizzle · High 33°C / Low 20°C · Rain: 0.1 mm · Wind: up to 19 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
